calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Perez.
Petitioner: Ursula Renate Jennings present in pro per for self and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Julien Augustin Jennings.
Petitioners was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of an Adult and of a Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of an adult to: Ursi Shana Jennings, and Change of Name of a Minor to: Julien Jennings.
Decree signed in open court.
